What We Do

Full-service outdoor transformation

🌱
Landscape Design

Custom design tailored to your space, goals, and style — Elpidio takes the time to understand your vision before a single shovel hits the ground.

💧
Irrigation Systems

New system installation, upgrades, and smart controller setup. We optimize water efficiency and can hook your system up to your phone.

🌿
Lawn Installation

Sod, seed, and synthetic turf options for lush, healthy lawns that stay green through Southern California's dry seasons.

🪨
Hardscaping & Stonework

Tile patios, stone stairs, retaining walls, and decorative borders — crafted to last and styled to impress.

🌺
Planting & Mulching

Flower beds, decorative grasses, mulch application, and replanting of overgrown or neglected plants with expert care.

🌳
Ongoing Maintenance

Regular scheduled maintenance — weekly, bi-weekly, or monthly — to keep your property consistently looking its best.
